text:
### Core Departments:
1. **Retail Banking** — Product delivery, customer acquisition
2. **Product Management** — Product lifecycle, pricing, features
3. **Operations** — Back-office processes, settlements
4. **Customer Service** — Support, complaints, retention
5. **Financial Crime** — AML, sanctions, fraud
6. **Compliance** — Regulatory reporting, internal controls
7. **Risk** — Enterprise risk, credit risk, operational risk
8. **Technology** — Systems, infrastructure, security
9. **Enterprise Architecture** — Technology strategy, integration design
10. **Marketing** — Brand, campaigns, market positioning
11. **Legal** — Contracts, regulatory affairs, litigation
12. **Internal Audit** — Control testing, audit findings  
---
name: Chunk 11/24

raw_entities.name: Retail Banking
raw_entities.description: A core department at FirstUK Bank responsible for product delivery and customer acquisition. It serves as the primary interface for retail customers and drives revenue through targeted product offerings.

raw_entities.name: Product Management
raw_entities.description: A core department overseeing the end-to-end product lifecycle, pricing strategies, and feature development. It ensures that bank products align with market demands and internal strategic goals.

raw_entities.name: Operations
raw_entities.description: A core department managing back-office processes and financial settlements. It ensures the smooth execution of daily banking transactions and operational workflows.

raw_entities.name: Customer Service
raw_entities.description: A core department focused on customer support, complaint resolution, and client retention. It acts as the frontline for addressing customer needs and maintaining service quality.

raw_entities.name: Financial Crime
raw_entities.description: A core department dedicated to anti-money laundering (AML), sanctions compliance, and fraud prevention. It monitors transactions and implements controls to mitigate financial crime risks.

raw_entities.name: Compliance
raw_entities.description: A core department responsible for regulatory reporting and maintaining internal controls. It ensures the bank adheres to all applicable laws, regulations, and internal policies.

raw_entities.name: Risk
raw_entities.description: A core department managing enterprise risk, credit risk, and operational risk across the organization. It identifies, assesses, and mitigates risks to protect the bank's financial stability.
context: **Risk** — Enterprise risk, credit risk, operational risk

raw_entities.name: Technology
raw_entities.description: A core department overseeing systems, infrastructure, and security operations. It maintains the technological backbone required for banking services and data protection.

raw_entities.name: Enterprise Architecture
raw_entities.description: A core department responsible for technology strategy and integration design. It aligns IT capabilities with business objectives and ensures cohesive system architecture.

raw_entities.name: Marketing
raw_entities.description: A core department managing brand identity, marketing campaigns, and market positioning. It drives customer engagement and promotes the bank's products in competitive markets.

raw_entities.name: Legal
raw_entities.description: A core department handling contracts, regulatory affairs, and litigation matters. It provides legal oversight and ensures compliance with contractual and statutory obligations.

raw_entities.name: Internal Audit
raw_entities.description: A core department conducting control testing and managing audit findings. It independently evaluates internal processes to ensure effectiveness and identify areas for improvement.
